data.title: Indivior reports Q4 results
data.description:
• Indivior press release (NASDAQ:INDV): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.32.
  • Revenue of $298M (+1.7% Y/Y).

data.title: D.R. Horton announces pricing of $700 million of 5.500% senior notes due 2035
data.description:
• D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) on Wednesday said that it has priced a registered underwritten public offering of $700 million aggregate principal amount of 5.500% senior notes due 2035.
  • The senior notes will pay interest semi-annually at a rate of 5.500% per year and will mature on October 15, 2035.
  • The closing of the offering is expected to occur on February 26, 2025.
  • D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) intends to use the net proceeds of the offering for general corporate purposes.

data.title: KKR buys 58% of Japan's FujiSoft for $4.4B, outbidding Bain Capital
SanDisk set to join S&P SmallCap 600
data.description:
• SanDisk (SNDK) will replace Leslie (LESL) in the S&P SmallCap 600 effective before trading on Tuesday, February 25.
  • S&P 500 constituent Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) is spinning off SanDisk (SNDK) in a transaction expected to be completed on February 24.
  • Western Digital will remain in the S&P 500 post-spin-off.
  • Leslie's market capitalization no longer represents the small cap market space.

data.title: SBM Offshore reports FY results
data.description:
• SBM Offshore press release (OTCPK:SBFFF): FY GAAP EPS of $0.84.
  • Revenue of $4.78B (-3.6% Y/Y).
  • Record Directional Revenue of US$6.1 billion (+35%), in line with guidance
  • Record Directional EBITDA of US$1.9 billion (+44%), in line with guidance
  • Record US$35.1 billion Directional backlog; US$9.5 billion or EUR51.6/share2 Directional net cash backlog3
  • 30% increase in cash return to US$1.59 per share4: US$155 million dividend; US$150 million share repurchase

data.title: Teck Resources reports Q4 results
data.description:
• Teck Resources press release (NYSE:TECK): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of C$0.45.
  • Revenue of C$2.79B (+51.6% Y/Y).
  • Adjusted EBITDA of C$835 million

data.title: AEGON reports 2H results
data.description:
• AEGON press release (NYSE:AEG): 2H Net profit of EUR 741 million as operating result and benefit from the a.s.r. stake are partly offset by restructuring charges and net impairments in the US
  • Operating result of EUR 776 million, up 14% compared with the second half of 2023, reflecting improved experience variance in the US and business growth in the US and asset management
  • Shareholders’ equity per share of EUR 4.53, increases by 13% compared with June 30, 2024, while contractual service margin per share after estimated tax adjustment increases by 5% to EUR 4.38. Valuation equity per share – the sum of these components – grew by 9% to EUR 8.91

data.title: Gerdau reports Q4 results
data.description:
• Gerdau press release (NYSE:GGB): Q4 Adjusted EBITDA of R$ 2.4B, up 17.2% from 4Q23.
  • Investments (CAPEX) amounted to R$2.4 billion in 4Q24, totaling R$6.2 billion for 2024.
  • For 2025, the comapny estimates an investment of R$6 billion in projects allocated to maintenance and competitiveness.

data.title: Calibre Mining reports Q4 results
data.description:
• Calibre Mining press release (OTCQX:CXBMF): Q4 Revenue of $202.97M (+33.9% Y/Y) misses by $0.63M.
  • Record consolidated Q4 gold production of 76,269 ounces, 2025 off to a strong start.
  • Consolidated FY 2024 gold production of 242,487 ounces, exceeding updated 2024 guidance.

data.title: Taseko Mines reports Q4 results
data.description:
• Taseko Mines press release (NYSE:TGB): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of C$0.03.
  • Revenue of C$167.8M (+9.2% Y/Y).
  • Total operating costs for the quarter were US$2.42 per pound produced
  • The Company had a cash balance of $173 million and approximately $331 million of available liquidity at December 31, 2024.
